promo_headline: Payments, edge, and a Linear AI mode.
whats_news: Linear: Linear AI mode opens to teams
Lenny: a long post on agent UI patterns

digest.title: AI is plumbing this week.
digest.body: Friday belongs to the infra companies, not the labs. Stripe, Cloudflare, and Linear all ship AI features into the developer workflow, and the most useful read of the day is Lenny on agent UI — together they map where the surface area for real product work is opening up.

items.headline: Stripe ships an AI-first payments dashboard
items.deck: Stripe replaced the legacy dashboard search and rules editor with conversational equivalents. This matters because Stripe sets the bar for financial UX and competitors will be pressured to follow within a quarter.

items.headline: Cloudflare AI Gateway adds streaming caches
items.deck: Cloudflare added partial-response caches to AI Gateway so identical streaming prefixes skip the model. This matters because streaming cache flips the unit economics for chat surfaces with repetitive openings.

items.headline: Linear AI mode opens to teams
items.deck: Linear flipped on AI triage, draft, and routing across team workspaces. This matters because workflow tools are where AI shows up as labor savings, not as demo magic.

items.headline: Lenny dissects 5 agent UI patterns
items.deck: Lenny's newsletter walks through five UI patterns that working agent products are converging on. This matters because the patterns set the vocabulary every product team will use to discuss agent surfaces over the next month.

items.headline: Anthropic opens a quiet enterprise tier
items.deck: Anthropic introduced a mid-tier enterprise plan with cluster commitments under the headline pricing. This matters because the new tier shifts which mid-sized companies can self-host frontier-class assistants.

items.headline: Read Lenny on agent UI patterns. Sketch one for your product.
items.why: The vocabulary is moving today; sketching now puts you ahead of the next sprint plan.
items.try: Set a 45-min timer. Pick the pattern that fits your product. Draw it on one page.

items.headline: Audit one workflow that should move to Linear AI.
items.why: Linear AI opens to teams today; switching costs are lowest on launch day before everyone has notes.
items.try: Set a 30-min timer. Pick the noisiest weekly triage and run it through Linear AI once.
